summary: Comprehensive testing of Task Management Web Application completed successfully. All backend APIs and frontend features are working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend API - Auth signup/login/logout (12/12 tests passed)
Backend API - Task CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
Backend API - Task filtering (status, priority, search)
Backend API - Analytics endpoint with proper data structure
Frontend - Login/logout flow with proper redirects
Frontend - Signup flow with new user creation
Frontend - Task creation with form validation
Frontend - Analytics view with stat cards and charts
Frontend - Mobile responsiveness with hamburger menu

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (18/19 tests passed - minor dropdown interaction issue)
